rationale: Educ. Code §43.009 governs prepayment of bonds held by the Permanent School Fund and restricts use of sinking fund tax levies. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b) amounts.
quote: The State Board of Education may authorize the governing body of any political subdivision in this state to pay off and discharge, at any interest paying date whether the bonds are matured or not, all or any part of any outstanding bond indebtedness owned by the permanent school fund.
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified; statute is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
